HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JENNIFER DUNN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. JENNIFER DUNN HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-01-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Lisa Padilla , Esq. for Plaintiff: Lakewood Apartments, LLC.
Plaintiff's Witness: Michelle Tamayo, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Nicolaus Goss.
No appearance by the Defaaulted Co-Defendants: William Goss and Jennifer Dunn.
Exhibit 1- Lease Agreement------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Three-Day Notice-----------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3- Proof of Service-----------------------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 555 John Muir Drive #B304, San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
Past-due Rent $1,504.00
Holdover Damages $3,015.84
Attorney Fees $675.00
Costs $520.00, for a Total of $5,714.84
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits and Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-01-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Comm. Sue Kaplan Dept.: 218 Clerk: S. Vantree

Matter comes on calendar for Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.

LISA PADILLA, ATTORNEY FOR THE PLAINTIFF LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS.

Settlement Conference is ordered off calendar. No appearance by Defendant. Trial Date remains. NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Sep-12-2007 Denied
